svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

value="User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="20" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-gateway" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.api_gateway;" (Lifecycle Policy)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudwatch-logs" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_2;" value="CloudWatch Logs
(7 days retention)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="480" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudwatch-alarm" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_2;" value="CloudWatch Alarm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="240" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iam-role" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.role;" value="IAM Role" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="480" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;" target="api-gateway" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn2" edge="1" parent="1" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;" target="lambda" value="Invoke"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn3" edge="1" parent="1" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;" target="dynamodb" value="Read/Write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn4" edge="1" parent="1" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;" target="s3" value="Get/Put Object"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn5" edge="1" parent="1" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch-logs" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn6" edge="1" parent="1" source="cloudwatch-alarm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="lambda" value="Monitors"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn7" edge="1" parent="1" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="iam-role" value="Assumes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cost-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Cost Optimization Features:
• Lambda ARM64 (20% cheaper)
• DynamoDB On-Demand billing
• S3 Lifecycle (IA after 30 days)
• CloudWatch Logs 7-day retention
• API Gateway throttling
• Minimal Lambda memory (128MB)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="160" x="860" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="security-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Security Best Practices:
• S3 encryption (AES256)
• S3 public access blocked
• DynamoDB encryption enabled
• IAM least privilege
• API Gateway regional endpoint
• CloudWatch monitoring" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="160" x="860" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Cost Optimization Features:
• Lambda ARM64 (20% cheaper)
• DynamoDB On-Demand billing
• S3 Lifecycle (IA after 30 days)
• CloudWatch Logs 7-day retention
• API Gateway throttling
• Minimal Lambda memory (128MB)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 307px; margin-left: 842px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Security Best Practices:
• S3 encryption (AES256)
• S3 public access blocked
• DynamoDB encryption enabled
• IAM least privilege
• API Gateway regional endpoint
• CloudWatch monitoring
